title: Engineer Mod
body:
This mod adds a villager that sell Redstone and other helpful items like blueprints.

This mod adds:
Blueprints- Allow you to insta build houses (Currently 2)
Workbench- Can be built to give the villager its profession
Engineer- a villager that sells Redstone and other helpful things
This mod only adds a Engineer no other custom villager is in the game yet.
This mod will be part of a larger villager expansion 

:)

keep watch for updates and new features
